title: Pan-Seared Wagyu Steak with Roast Vegetables
description: A simple yet elegant dish featuring a pan-seared wagyu steak served with a medley of roasted vegetables.

ingredients.name: italian olive oil
ingredients.notes: for brushing the grill and vegetables

instructions: Season the wagyu steaks with salt and pepper. Let them sit at room temperature for 30 minutes.
Brush the grill with italian olive oil to prevent sticking.
Sear the wagyu steaks for 3-4 minutes per side, or until they reach your desired level of doneness.
While the steaks are cooking, toss the roast potatoes and silky carrots with salt and pepper.
Transfer the vegetables to a baking sheet and roast them in the oven at 425°F (220°C) for 20-25 minutes, or until they're tender.
Let the wagyu steaks rest for 5-10 minutes before slicing them.
Serve the pan-seared wagyu steak with the roasted vegetables and your choice of side dishes.
